title: Lucy Faces Don Chinjao
description: Pages 1–4 focus on lucy faces don chinjao, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Momonosuke, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as luffy’s Colosseum path becomes personal when Don Chinjao recognizes his connection to Garp and attacks him with old resentment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Coastal waters off Dressrosa

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Get away from the sunny- go!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: be silent!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ohhoh hoho

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: thousand sunny-go

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Who are you calling a mermaid Princess!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We didn't say that!!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Hurry up and hand over momo- Nosuke!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Earlier you just had an EEL with you, so how is the boy there now!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Remember if people

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Young Master's orders were to Kidnap Momonosuke...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And to seize your ship !!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Of all the things....!! If she keeps going wild with that ability...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Even the sunny-go may become unable as a ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: If you want to attack us here, that's fine, but do it away from the ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Remember everybody

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: You men!! Hurry up and steal momo- Nosuke away from those people!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: this won't do. This won't do at all

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Ah ... hey!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: JORA- SAMA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This won't do ... ah, my spirit is starting to shimmy and shake!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Ohoho hoho!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: An image is coming to me!! My soul is about to come forth!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: This is bad!! Looks like she's gonna do that again!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: In the men's quarters, which she had slipped into...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The lockers and beds are already in a crazy state!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Needless to say, frankly will be mad, but can they even be returned to normal!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Ah, an image of *liberation" and "beauty" is bursting out!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Oi, cut that out!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Don't do that aboard our ship!! We're over here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: If you want us, then come and get us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Freedom is everything in this world!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Isn't it!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: She's really gone and done it now! How awful!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Kyahh

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Crap!!

summary: Pages 1–4 focus on lucy faces don chinjao, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
